properties.name: id
properties.description: Surrogate primary key for the Meeting aggregate.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Optional user-readable meeting title. Defaults to the source filename if not provided.

properties.name: language
properties.description: Transcription language for the meeting (RU or EN). Null until resolved (per BRQ-005 auto-detect fallback during ASR).

properties.name: status
properties.description: Pipeline-mirror status of the meeting (BRQ-008). Drives UI state and disables protocol actions before TRANSCRIPT_READY.

properties.name: uploaded_at
properties.description: Timestamp when the upload was initiated. Immutable.

properties.name: updated_at
properties.description: Timestamp of the last status transition or protocol edit. Used to sort the meeting catalog by recent activity.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Surrogate primary key for the Recording.

properties.name: meeting_id
properties.description: FK to the owning Meeting (ent-001). Also surfaced as a RELATES_TO edge in the graph.

properties.name: filename
properties.description: Original filename as supplied by the user at upload time.

properties.name: size_bytes
properties.description: File size in bytes. MUST be <= 524,288,000 per BRQ-001 (500 MB).
